competencies: Formulate boundary value problems in solid mechanics for FE analysis
Derive weak forms and apply variational calculus
Build FE discretizations using shape functions and isoparametric elements
Solve engineering structural problems with commercial FE software (Ansys, Matlab)
description_en: Introduces the finite element method for solving solid-mechanics boundary value problems, covering discretization, shape functions and commercial FE software.

competencies: Develop sculptural designs uniting form, colour and material
Balance aesthetic, ergonomic and technical design requirements
Sketch and model functional objects to evaluate perceptual quality
Build physical models to validate design solutions
description_en: Trains sculptural design skills uniting form, colour and material for functional objects through sketching, modelling and physical model-making.

competencies: Develop an individual artistic visual language
Apply fundamental principles of two-dimensional visual design
Build aesthetic competence in surface composition
Foster creative design thinking independent of technical constraints
description_en: A foundational course in visual design developing artistic visual language and aesthetic competence in two-dimensional surface composition.

competencies: Perform kinematic and dynamic analysis of mobile robots
Design wheeled and legged locomotion systems
Apply localization, path planning and obstacle avoidance methods
Implement machine vision with feature extraction and sensor data fusion
Develop mobile robots in teams to accomplish defined tasks
description_en: Covers fundamentals of mobile and autonomous robots including kinematics, sensors, localization and navigation, with a hands-on robot-development lab.

competencies: Analyze supply chains and handling plants for bulk materials
Apply the mechanics and physics of bulk materials
Calculate throughput and power consumption of continuous conveyors
Identify critical zones using Discrete Element Method (DEM) simulations
description_en: Covers logistics and handling of bulk materials, including conveyor design, throughput calculation and DEM simulation of critical handling zones.

competencies: Describe fundamental psychoacoustic quantities and their physical correlates
Apply measurement methods for hearing acoustics
Calculate loudness as a basic perceptual quantity
Characterize perception of noise, tonal sounds and binaural hearing
description_en: Teaches the fundamentals of psychoacoustics, including loudness calculation, sound measurement and perceptual characterization of technical and environmental noise.

competencies: Analyze industrial processes to identify change requirements
Structure and organize industrial projects from analytical task breakdown
Manage projects using goal-oriented project structures
Apply key-figure-based project controlling
description_en: Teaches structuring, organizing and controlling of industrial projects through analytical task breakdown and key-figure-based project management.

competencies: Analyze components under inelastic material response (plasticity, creep, relaxation)
Apply constitutive laws for plasticity and creep
Evaluate mechanical behavior of structures in the inelastic regime
Perform finite element analysis of inelastic components
description_en: Covers analysis of components with inelastic material behavior such as plasticity and creep using constitutive laws and finite element methods.

competencies: Apply holistic, integrated product development across multiple product views
Balance function, form, safety, quality, ergonomics and sustainability synergistically
Use IDE authoring, simulation and management tools
Manage interdisciplinary design projects and processes
description_en: Teaches integrated, holistic product development balancing function, form and sustainability across interdisciplinary projects using IDE tools.

competencies: Explain elements of transport infrastructure and intelligent transport systems
Apply traffic data acquisition, analysis and information systems
Design traffic control and management strategies
Apply V2X communication for connected and autonomous driving
description_en: Introduces intelligent transport systems combining IT, communication and traffic engineering for safer, more efficient mobility and connected autonomous driving.

competencies: Classify composite materials and their property changes from constituents
Estimate mechanical properties, thermal stability and applications of composites
Combine different material classes for composite formation
Relate manufacturing processes to composite material properties
description_en: Provides a deeper understanding of lightweight and composite materials, their mechanics, manufacturing processes and resulting applications.

competencies: Apply current logistics strategies, methods and tools
Use Six-Sigma and quality-management tools in logistics
Design supply chains and model material-flow systems
Assess system reliability and risk in material-flow systems
description_en: Surveys logistics strategies and methods including supply chain design, Six-Sigma tools, simulation and reliability of material-flow systems.

competencies: Analyze markets and buyer behaviour
Develop marketing and sales plans using suitable methods
Apply labour-management regulation and works-constitution law
Apply human-resource planning, acquisition and staff leadership
description_en: Covers marketing, sales, labour-management regulation and human-resource management, including market analysis and staff planning and leadership.

competencies: Analyze complex material-handling systems with continuous and non-continuous conveyors
Calculate working cycles and throughput rates of handling systems
Identify throughput bottlenecks under deterministic and stochastic arrivals
Assess availability and reliability of material-handling systems
description_en: Teaches analysis of material-handling systems including throughput, working-cycle calculation and availability and reliability assessment.

competencies: Apply computational materials science methods across multiple scales
Predict material properties using physically-based models
Use DFT, atomistic, dislocation and phase-field modelling techniques
Run material simulations bridging scales with appropriate software
description_en: Introduces computational materials science across scales, from DFT and atomistic to phase-field modelling, with hands-on simulation exercises.

competencies: Analyze crystal structures, symmetry and dislocation theory
Relate microstructure to macroscopic properties of metals and alloys
Explain elastic and plastic deformation including high-temperature creep
Apply strengthening mechanisms and phase-transformation thermodynamics
description_en: Provides advanced understanding of metallic materials, linking crystal structure, dislocations and microstructure to mechanical and high-temperature properties.

competencies: Formulate calculation methods for lightweight composite structures
Apply plate and shell theory considering anisotropy and large deformations
Perform laminate calculations using classical and higher-order layer theory
Assess possibilities and limits of numerical simulation for lightweight structures
description_en: Teaches calculation methods for lightweight composite structures, covering plate and shell theory, anisotropy and laminate calculation.

competencies: Model elastic behavior of isotropic and anisotropic materials
Describe inelastic behavior including plasticity, creep and stress relaxation
Translate experimental observations into mathematical material equations
Apply concepts of material damage and fracture
description_en: Covers the basics of material behavior modeling, from experiment to mathematical equations for elastic, inelastic, damage and fracture behavior.

competencies: Understand product development and manufacturing of medical devices
Apply regulatory approval and clinical evaluation requirements for medical devices
Analyze corporate perspectives on medical technology from industry talks
Document and present project results on medical-device requirements
description_en: Company-led lectures giving real-world insight into development, manufacturing, testing and regulatory approval of medical devices, with project work.

competencies: Classify micro and ultra-precision machining within production technology
Describe ablative and cutting processes for micro-machining
Design process chains for micro and ultra-precision manufacturing
Specify process, tool and machine requirements for ultra-precision machining
description_en: Covers micro and ultra-precision machining, including ablative and cutting processes, process-chain design and ultra-precision turning and milling.

competencies: Apply simulation concepts and simulation-based optimization to production and logistics
Conduct all phases of a simulation study from goal description to experiments
Use discrete-event, discrete-rate and system-dynamics simulation paradigms
Work with simulation tools such as Plant Simulation, AnyLogic and ExtendSim
description_en: Teaches simulation and simulation-based optimization for production and logistics planning across multiple paradigms and industry simulation tools.

competencies: Describe components of electric and hybrid powertrains
Model and simulate drive components and drivetrain systems
Apply model-based development methods for powertrains
Analyze operating behavior and optimization of drive systems
description_en: Teaches modelling and simulation of electric and hybrid powertrains and model-based development and optimization of drive components and systems.

competencies: Plan and configure complex assembly systems
Characterize assembly tasks and identify assembly-specific requirements
Design technical-organizational assembly system solutions
Evaluate assembly operations under economic and performance aspects
description_en: Teaches planning and conceptual design of complex assembly systems from task characterization to layout, configuration and economic evaluation.

competencies: Apply fundamentals of airborne and structure-borne acoustics
Use sound measurement and evaluation methods
Assess noise effects and regulatory limits
Derive noise-reduction measures for engines and vehicles
description_en: Covers engine and vehicle acoustics, including sound measurement, noise assessment and methods for reducing engine and vehicle noise.

competencies: Model dynamic mechanical systems as multibody systems
Apply time-integration methods to solve equations of motion
Handle constraints, joints and elastic multibody systems
Implement multibody dynamics programmatically and with commercial tools
description_en: Teaches multibody dynamics for analyzing complex dynamical systems, covering modelling strategies, time integration, constraints and elastic bodies.

competencies: Apply a holistic systemic approach to sustainable mobility
Relate mobility to quality of life, resources and environmental impact
Evaluate electromobility, new mobility forms and Mobility-as-a-Service
Assess policy instruments and acceptance of mobility measures
description_en: Provides a holistic systemic view of sustainable mobility, covering electromobility, resources, environmental impact and policy instruments.

competencies: Select non-ferrous metals and alloys for special applications
Relate structure to properties for polymers and composite materials
Characterize ceramics, glasses and inorganic functional materials
Apply structure-property relationships for material selection
description_en: Surveys new materials including non-ferrous metals, polymers, composites and ceramics, focusing on structure-property relationships and material selection.

competencies: Recognize the need for geometrically and physically nonlinear analysis
Formulate continuum-mechanics fundamentals for nonlinear FEM
Build geometrically nonlinear finite elements and solve nonlinear systems
Handle contact problems and nonlinear material models in FEM
description_en: Teaches nonlinear finite element analysis, covering geometric and material nonlinearity, solution methods for nonlinear systems and contact problems.

competencies: Develop planning solutions for production and logistics systems
Analyze logistics processes in distribution and fulfilment centres
Evaluate solution variants and analyze and control supply chains
Document, present and defend project results to target audiences
description_en: A practice-oriented project module developing planning solutions for production and logistics systems through company case studies and team project work.

competencies: Classify precision and micro-manufacturing technologies
Describe ablative technologies such as ECM, EDM and laser machining
Explain cutting technologies for precision and micro-manufacturing
Design process chains for precision and micro-manufacturing
description_en: Covers precision and micro-manufacturing technologies, including ablative and cutting processes and process-chain design for micro-scale parts.

competencies: Apply design-oriented and integrative approaches to product design
Balance aesthetic, ergonomic and technical product requirements
Use analog and digital design and drawing tools
Account for human-centred usage processes in product form-giving
description_en: Teaches the role of product design in integrated development, training design-oriented form-giving that balances aesthetic, ergonomic and technical needs.

competencies: Apply methods for planning and designing factory and production systems
Analyze and condense planning-relevant data for production systems
Dimension resources and optimize machine layout under constraints
Develop a master plan for a functional overall production system
description_en: Teaches methodical planning and design of factory and production systems, including data analysis, resource dimensioning and machine-layout optimization.

competencies: Work on a project in a goal-oriented and effective manner
Establish the connections needed to deliver a project
Document project results
Present and defend project outcomes
description_en: An individual or team project module in which students work on, document, present and defend a research- or teaching-related engineering project.
